description: Apply a critical bug fix patch to the 'RadiationTherapy' project. A senior physicist has sent a patch file ('physics_fix.patch') located at ~/Desktop/physics_fix.patch. This patch fixes a Monitor Unit calculation error in 'DoseCalculator.java' (adding Inverse Square Law correction) and updates daily calibration factors in 'CalibrationConstants.java'. Apply the patch to the project, verify the fix by running the 'DoseTest' JUnit test (src/test/java/com/med/physics/DoseTest.java), and save all changes.
